mustPass: Hero copy includes the clinic specialism and city, not generic 'we care about your health' filler.
At least one named clinician with a licence or credential is visible on the home page.
Treatment list uses plain Swedish, not Latin or insider jargon.
Booking conversion path is reachable from every page (header CTA or sticky mobile bar).
Opening hours are present on contact and home pages.
Address, phone and email are real values, not sample data.
All routes from routes.json are present.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Surgical, bloody or distressing imagery in hero or above-the-fold sections.
Generic 'passionate about helping people'-style copy without a clinician name, year founded or treatment specialism.
Hiding credentials behind a click — licences and qualifications must be visible without navigation.
Random color choices not derived from variant tokens.
Booking forms that fail at build because of missing third-party env vars.
